overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character moves from covered sidewalks past glass facades and digital billboards, through open plazas with street vendors, across wet intersections, and finally to an outdoor gym area under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath an overpass structure

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure covering the pedestrian walkway
multi-story glass facade building with illuminated advertisements
bright red and green neon signs including a cola advertisement
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk in a cyberpunk city. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the glass commercial buildings on the left, while the right side features storefronts with glowing signage. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with trees and food vendors

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with large trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing a blue food cart on the right

notable_agents.action: vendor standing under red umbrella next to food cart

entered.detail: mature tree with dense canopy in the center of the plaza
small blue vendor cart with illuminated service window
large vertical billboard displaying a face advertisement
wide concrete steps leading up to higher plaza level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the covered walkway to an open plaza with wet pavement reflecting the ambient light. A large tree dominates the center while a blue food cart sits on the right. The camera moves toward concrete steps in the distance, passing a vendor under a red umbrella. The sky is fully visible and the rain continues to fall.

events.description: enters street crossing area with yellow striped crosswalk
waiting at intersection for vehicles to pass before crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet multi-lane street at the yellow crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
elevated pedestrian bridge with green structural supports spanning the road
various cars and taxis driving on the wet asphalt with headlights on
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the plaza onto a wide urban intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks. Vehicles with glowing headlights pass by on the rain-slicked asphalt. A green pedestrian overpass spans the road ahead, and digital billboards are visible on the overpass structure. The scene is exposed to the rain with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian underpass with stairs and outdoor gym

events.description: enters covered area beneath the pedestrian overpass
begins ascending concrete stairs to upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs and through outdoor gym area with weight equipment

notable_agents.action: muscular individual lifting weights at outdoor gym station

entered.detail: solid concrete structure of the pedestrian bridge overhead
wide concrete staircase leading up to the overpass level
barbells and weight plates arranged on the wet concrete platform
heavy red punching bag hanging from metal frame

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the pedestrian overpass into a sheltered concrete area, then ascends stairs to an outdoor gym plaza. Weightlifting equipment including barbells and a red punching bag are visible on the wet concrete surface. The area is partially covered by the overpass structure, and a few individuals are exercising in the open-air gym space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched cyberpunk district, moving from sheltered commercial walkways into open urban spaces and finally to a concrete athletic area. It begins along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk, passing glowing storefronts and digital billboards that reflect off the wet asphalt. As the camera leaves the cover of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the rain falls freely around a central tree and a blue food cart before moving toward distant concrete steps. The perspective then shifts across a wide urban intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks and passing vehicles, heading directly toward a green pedestrian overpass. Finally, the camera moves under the shelter of the overpass and ascends a set of stairs to reach an outdoor gym plaza featuring barbells and a red punching bag on the wet concrete.
